reviews.comment:
Fui a cargar nafta como turista un desastre 40 minutos esperando y tenía 3 autos adelante! Le cargaban los bidones a los lugareños y nos hacían esperar! Nos atendieron cuando se les dio la gana!

(Translated by Google)
I went to get gas as a tourist and it was a disaster! I waited 40 minutes and there were 3 cars ahead of me! They were filling up the jerrycans for the locals and making us wait! They served us whenever they felt like it!
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/15516558717533724848/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUR3bHN5enF3RRAB
